nasb.text: “You shall work six days, but on the seventh day you shall rest; even during plowing time and harvest you shall rest.

esv.text: “Six days you shall work, but on the seventh day you shall rest. In plowing time and in harvest you shall rest.

cnv.text: “你六日要工作，但第七天你要休息，在耕種和收割的時候，也要休息。

ccb.text: “一周工作六天，第七天要休息，就是耕种和收割时也要休息。
